questionText: Provide details of the environmental requirements that external asset managers have to meet as part of your organization's selection process and engagement.
questionKo: 외부 자산 관리자가 귀사의 선정 과정 및 참여의 일환으로 충족해야 하는 환경 요구 사항에 대한 세부 사항을 설명하십시오
simpleHelp: For asset owners and managers working with external funds (third parties), the external asset managers have a significant effect on investment strategies and objectives. Including environmental requirements into the selection of and engagement with external asset managers ensures that these investment strategies and objectives are aligned with the organization's business strategy.

columns.text: Environmental issues covered by the requirement
Environmental requirement that external asset managers have to meet
options: Having a transition plan, which is aligned with a 1.5°C world
Membership/signatory of a sustainable finance initiative(s) and/or alliance(s)
Offering environmentally sustainable products and services
optionsKo: a 전환 계획, 부합하는 와/과 a 1.5°C

columns.text: Mechanisms used to include environmental requirement in external asset manager selection
options: Include environmental requirements in requests for proposals
Preference for investment managers with an offering of funds resilient to environmental issues
Include environmental requirements in investment mandates
Include environmental requirements in performance indicators and incentive structures
Review investment manager's environmental performance (e.g., active ownership, proxy voting records, under-weighting in high impact activities)
Publish requirements of external investment managers in relation to environmental issues
optionsKo: 에 대한 투자 와/과 환경 이슈
투자 관리자's 환경 성과 (예:,, 의결권 행사, 영향 활동)

columns.text: Response to external asset manager non-compliance with environmental requirement
% of non-compliant external asset managers engaged

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in column 1 "External asset managers have to meet specific environmental requirements as part of the selection process and engagement" of 5.14.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
Add rows if the requirements that external asset managers have to meet differ between environmental issues or if you do not use the same mechanisms for all your assets managed externally.
Response to external asset manager non-compliance with environmental requirement (column 5) 
Select the most relevant procedure your organization has in place for responding to non-compliant external asset managers. Further details on each of the options are provided below:
Exclude : Select this option if you end a relationship with an external asset manager (in the case of a prior or ongoing relationship). This option is also applicable if you do not establish a relationship because of the external asset manager's unwillingness to comply with the environmental requirement.
No response: Select this option if you do not have a procedure for responding to non-compliant external asset managers.
Suspend and engage : Select this option if you temporarily do not use the external asset manager service but continue to engage with the external asset manager to resolve the non-compliance.
Retain and engage : Select this option if you continue to use the external asset manager service while engaging with the external asset manager to resolve the non-compliance.
Other, please specify : Select this option if your response to external asset manager non-compliance with environmental requirements is not on the list and provide a label.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text:
Investors include environmental requirements in the selection process and engagement with external asset managers.
Where relevant, the entity discloses its approach to incorporation of environmental issues in external investment management practices: in selecting external fund managers and fiduciary managers and oversight/accountability approach to assessing the quality of incorporation.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the requirement':
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate Change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the requirement' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Awareness points:
''Climate Change' selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the requirement' in at least one row AND
Full Disclosure points awarded.
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the requirement':
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Mechanisms used to include environmental requirement...' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
One row scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Management points:
'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the requirement' in at least one row AND
Full Awareness points awarded.
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the requirement':
i) Either 'All assets managed externally' OR 'Majority of assets managed externally' selected in column 'Coverage' in all rows - 1 point
ii) Any option excluding 'No response' selected in column 'Response to external asset manager non-compliance with environmental requirements' - 1 point
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
One row scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.
이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

change.daml_summary: Financial services: D 3/3 | A 1/1 | M 2/2 | L 0/0

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '외부 자산 관리자가 귀사의 선정 과정 및 참여의 일환으로 충족해야 하는 환경 요구 사항에 대한 세부 사항을 설명하십시오'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: CDP 국문 양식 기반 국문 보정
